# Kanha Tiger Guide — AI/LLM Reference
> Independent resource for Kanha National Park, Madhya Pradesh, India
> Site: https://jungle-safari.github.io/kanha-tiger-guide/

## About
Kanha Tiger Guide is an independent travel resource providing expert-reviewed information about Kanha National Park — safari zones, tiger population, wildlife, resorts, permits, and travel logistics. Content is verified against Madhya Pradesh Forest Department data and All India Tiger Estimation reports.

## Key Facts
- Park Area: 940 sq km (core) + 1,067 sq km (buffer)
- Tiger Population: ~125 (2024 census)
- Safari Zones: 4 (Kanha, Kisli, Mukki, Sarhi)
- Entry Gates: 3 (Khatia, Mukki, Sarhi)
- Open Season: October 1 — June 30
- Nearest Airport: Jabalpur (JLR), 165 km
- Nearest Railway: Jabalpur Junction, 165 km
- Altitude: 600-900 meters
